items.title_zh: Kimi WebBridge
items.desc_en: A bridge connecting AI agents to the live web
items.desc_zh: 连接人工智能代理和实时网络的桥梁

items.title_en: Tape shows Bolsonaro son asking jailed banker for $26.8m to fund film on father - The Guardian
items.title_zh: 录像带显示博尔索纳罗的儿子向入狱的银行家索要2680万美元资助拍摄父亲的电影 - 卫报
items.desc_en: Tape shows Bolsonaro son asking jailed banker for $26.8m to fund film on father  The GuardianHow a Jim Caviezel film got mixed up in a Brazilian political scandal  ReutersA bombshell leak threatens Fl
items.desc_zh: 录像带显示博尔索纳罗的儿子向入狱的银行家索要 2680 万美元，以资助拍摄有关父亲的电影

items.title_en: 'Millions' of pounds saved by replacing Palantir tech in refugee system
items.title_zh: 通过在难民系统中更换 Palantir 技术节省了“数百万英镑”
items.desc_en: The government said its in-house IT system was "more flexible" while meeting "high standards" of security.
items.desc_zh: 政府表示，其内部IT系统“更加灵活”，同时满足“高标准”的安全性。

items.title_en: Five Italians die during cave dive in Maldives
items.title_zh: 五名意大利人在马尔代夫洞穴潜水中丧生
items.desc_en: Italy says the incident happened at a depth of 50m. Maldivian rescuers have so far found one body.
items.desc_zh: 意大利称事件发生在50m深处。马尔代夫救援人员迄今已发现一具尸体。

items.title_en: 'We didn't die': Pilot recounts crash landing in Atlantic with 10 aboard
items.title_zh: “我们没有死”：飞行员讲述机上 10 人在大西洋迫降的情景
items.desc_en: The 11 survivors spent roughly five hours on a life raft, before being rescued by the US Air Force off Florida coast.
items.desc_zh: 11 名幸存者在救生筏上度过了大约 5 个小时，然后在佛罗里达州海岸被美国空军救起。

items.title_en: War criminal Ratko Mladić's jail release request denied
items.title_zh: 战犯拉特科·姆拉迪奇的释放请求被拒绝
items.desc_en: A UN judge admits the 84-year-old is "in the final stages of his life", but says prison conditions in The Hague ensure his maximum comfort.
items.desc_zh: 一名联合国法官承认这位 84 岁的老人“正处于生命的最后阶段”，但表示海牙的监狱条件确保了他最大的舒适度。

items.title_en: Autograph.video Beta

items.desc_zh: 用于快速交换创意的拖放运动设计工具

items.title_zh: Planora
items.desc_en: A digital workspace for creative collaboration
items.desc_zh: 用于创意协作的数字工作空间

items.title_en: Basedash MCP Connectors
items.title_zh: Basedash MCP Connectors
items.desc_en: Connect any app. Take action anywhere.
items.desc_zh: 连接任何应用程序。随时随地采取行动。

items.title_en: Whiteout
items.title_zh: Whiteout
items.desc_en: Auto-redact sensitive info from Mac screenshots
items.desc_zh: 自动编辑 Mac 屏幕截图中的敏感信息

items.title_en: Warning of record global temperatures as chance of very strong El Niño grows
items.title_zh: 强烈厄尔尼诺现象的可能性增加，全球气温将创历史新高
items.desc_en: As El Niño develops this year, scientists are increasingly confident it could be one of the strongest on record with global consequences, as Simon King explains.
items.desc_zh: 正如西蒙·金（Simon King）解释的那样，随着今年厄尔尼诺现象的发展，科学家们越来越有信心它可能是有记录以来最强烈的厄尔尼诺现象之一，并对全球产生影响。

items.title_en: Cuba has run out of diesel and oil, energy minister says
items.title_zh: 古巴能源部长称柴油和石油已耗尽
items.desc_en: The minister says the situation in Cuba is "extremely tense", as a US-led blockade of oil to the country causes widespread power cuts.
items.desc_zh: 这位部长表示，古巴的局势“极其紧张”，因为美国主导的对该国石油封锁导致大范围断电。

items.title_en: HMRC to use AI from British tech firm to spot fraud and tax return errors
items.title_zh: 英国税务海关总署将使用英国科技公司的人工智能来发现欺诈和纳税申报错误
items.desc_en: Quantexa, a financial data platform, won the £175m contract to spot fraud and tax return errors.
items.desc_zh: 金融数据平台 Quantexa 赢得了价值 1.75 亿英镑的合同，以发现欺诈和纳税申报错误。

items.title_en: Agentic Website Builder 2.0 by Lokuma
items.title_zh: Agentic Website Builder 2.0 by Lokuma
items.desc_en: Design, build, and run your site with a design agent harness
items.desc_zh: 使用设计代理工具设计、构建和运行您的站点

items.title_en: Gradient Bang
items.title_zh: Gradient Bang
items.desc_en: Massively multi-player game played by talking to an LLM
items.desc_zh: 通过与法学硕士交谈来玩的大型多人游戏

items.title_en: WhatsApp launches totally private 'incognito' conversations with its AI chatbot
items.title_zh: WhatsApp 与其人工智能聊天机器人推出完全私密的“隐身”对话
items.desc_en: A cyber security expert says deleting chat history could lead to a lack of accountability if things go wrong.
items.desc_zh: 一位网络安全专家表示，如果出现问题，删除聊天记录可能会导致缺乏责任感。

items.title_en: TrustClaw by Composio
items.title_zh: TrustClaw by Composio
items.desc_en: Self-hosted AI agent that connects 1000+ apps on Vercel
items.desc_zh: 自托管 AI 代理，可连接 Vercel 上的 1000 多个应用程序

items.title_en: Suicide forum fined £950,000 for not blocking UK users
items.title_zh: 自杀论坛因未屏蔽英国用户而被罚款 95 万英镑
items.desc_en: The regulator said the forum had not done enough to protect UK users - but critics accuse Ofcom of acting too slowly.
items.desc_zh: 该监管机构表示，该论坛在保护英国用户方面做得不够，但批评者指责 Ofcom 行动太慢。

items.title_en: Thousands of Waymo robotaxis recalled over risk of entering flooded roads
items.title_zh: 数千辆 Waymo 机器人出租车因存在进入被洪水淹没的道路的风险而被召回
items.desc_en: The voluntary recall follows an incident on 20 April where an empty Waymo car entered a flooded road in San Antonio, Texas.
items.desc_zh: 此次自愿召回是在 4 月 20 日发生的一起事件之后发生的，当时一辆空的 Waymo 汽车进入德克萨斯州圣安东尼奥市一条被洪水淹没的道路。

items.title_en: Crustimate
items.title_zh: Crustimate

items.desc_zh: 修复您的 LinkedIn，让 AI 招聘人员找到您

items.title_en: More than 70 million warnings sent to people seeking child abuse material
items.title_zh: 向寻求虐待儿童材料的人们发出了超过 7000 万条警告
items.desc_en: The messages highlight the illegality of what people are searching for online and direct them towards help.
items.desc_zh: 这些消息强调人们在网上搜索的内容是非法的，并引导他们寻求帮助。

items.title_en: Smart glasses are 'an invasion of privacy' - Meta's are selling better than ever
items.title_zh: 智能眼镜“侵犯隐私”——Meta 的销量比以往任何时候都好
items.desc_en: The biggest tech firms are set to sell millions of smart glasses despite growing privacy concerns.
items.desc_zh: 尽管隐私问题日益严重，但最大的科技公司仍将销售数百万副智能眼镜。

items.title_en: Tech Life
items.title_zh: 科技生活

items.desc_zh: 摇摇欲坠的道路和其他危险——人工智能能让我们的街道更安全吗？

items.title_en: Sam Altman: Elon Musk wanted control of OpenAI even after death
items.title_zh: 山姆·奥尔特曼：埃隆·马斯克死后仍想控制 OpenAI
items.desc_en: Sam Altman said Elon Musk tried many times for total control of OpenAI, which he's now suing.
items.desc_zh: 山姆·奥尔特曼表示，埃隆·马斯克曾多次尝试完全控制 OpenAI，目前他正在起诉 OpenAI。

items.title_en: Canvas hack: company pays criminals to delete students' stolen data
items.title_zh: Canvas 黑客：公司付钱给犯罪分子，让他们删除学生被盗的数据
items.desc_en: The company behind Canvas says it has "reached an agreement" with the hackers who disrupted thousands of colleges and universities.
items.desc_zh: Canvas 背后的公司表示，它已经与扰乱数千所学院和大学的黑客“达成协议”。
